keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY LARYNX AND TRACHEA. Larynx and trachea : Aco., Bell., Brom., Caust., Cepa., Dros., Hep., Iod., Kali-bi., Lach., Mang., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Rum., Spo., Stan., Sul. Larynx and trachea, right : Agar., Kali-n., Pul., Stan., Stict. Larynx and trachea, left : Caust., Crot-h., Hep., Lach., Rhus-t., Sul-ac., Thu., Til. Larynx and trachea, backward bending , amel. : Hep. Larynx and trachea, constriction , spasm, etc. : Bell., Cup., Ign., Lach., Mos., Ver-a. Larynx and trachea, coughing , agg. : Aco., Aru-t., Bell., Cepa., Pho. Larynx and trachea, cutting : Manc., Nit-ac. Larynx and trachea, dry spot . see Throat. Larynx and trachea, grasps the : Aco., Aru-t., Cepa., Dros., Iod., Naj., Pho. Larynx and trachea, mucus in : Lyc., Pho., Seneg. Larynx and trachea, rattling in : Ant-t., Hep., Ip. Larynx and trachea, rough , raw, etc. : Caust., Mang., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Stan., Sul. Larynx and trachea, talking , amel. : Rhus-t., Sele. Larynx and trachea, tickling in : Aco., Ap., Brom., Caps., Cham., Con., Ign., Kali-bi., Lach., Lyc., Nat-m., Nux-v., Op., Pho., Psor., Pul., Rhus-t., Rum., Sang., Sep., Sil., Stan. Larynx and trachea, touch , agg. : Lach., Pho., Spo. Larynx and trachea, tuberculosis of : Carb-v., Dros., Spo. Larynx and trachea, weak : Alu., Bar-c., Caust., Gels., Plb., Sul.
